author: @kail_designs
text:
Need icons?

Here are some of the best icon libraries on the web.

You'll find:

• 200,000+ icons
• animated icons
• multiple styles
• brand icons
• code exports (React, SVG & more)

Probably all the icons you'll ever need. https://t.co/A5jx3GWBry https://t.co/Q3tqkIOaNO

included.text:
If you want to design faster in Figma,

Use blocks.

→ https://t.co/CsJKHN2Fr3

A free library of ready-to-use Figma UI blocks.

Copy any component, paste it into your file, and start building instantly.

Perfect for landing pages, layouts, and UI sections.

Use it for:

• landing page sections
• UI components
• layout structures
• quick prototypes
• design inspiration you can actually use

Stop designing everything from scratch.
